insights.title: Prediction confidence remains high
insights.description: The model found a consistent upward trend after 10:10, likely caused by burst traffic accumulation.

insights.title: Best intervention window is now
insights.description: Applying routing and scaling before the next spike should protect the SLA and reduce expected delay.

insights.title: Critical flows should be prioritized
insights.description: Latency-sensitive service classes can be preserved by using policy-based queue prioritization.
